examples: What will you do to atone for this sin?
Perform meritorious service to atone for one's crimes so as to obtain clemency from the people.
But will they atone for all that injustice?
To atone, Mr Demirbas has been providing money and materials to restore Christian monuments in Sur.
But Israel's Libyan Jews say he has sought to atone for his youthful Arab radicalism.
